assessment.note: Promotion disappointment has made him more cautious about spending political capital, signalling a strong growth blocker and mild uncertainty about how to advance.

new_queue.label: Political capital
new_queue.name: Political capital — where are you holding back right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific arenas where the promotion outcome made him less willing to take visible positions.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Current footing
new_queue.name: What's feeling solid in your role right now, Toby?
new_queue.description: Lets Toby set context on what is working before the conversation turns to growth gaps.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Next role picture
new_queue.name: What kind of design work would make the next step feel real for you?
new_queue.description: Forces a concrete picture of the scope and outcomes that would signal the next level.

new_queue.label: Decision ownership
new_queue.name: What decisions are you already making that should be explicitly yours?
new_queue.description: Identifies where he is acting at the next level without yet owning the authority or framing.

new_queue.label: Sponsorship shape
new_queue.name: What kind of sponsorship would actually move the needle for you here?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific air cover, introductions, or backing he needs instead of generic support.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff choice
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to trade off to make more room for strategic influence?
new_queue.description: Forces a real prioritisation conversation about what gets dropped to create headspace for leadership work.

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to do before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment that turns the growth conversation into an action plan.
